_comment: Snapshot of hardcoded scene defaults — not loaded at runtime. Values mirror src/scripts/* as of 2026-07-03 (hand-tuned via GUI 'Copy settings'). Tune in code or use dev GUI (?lights).

meta.description: Read-only inventory of Three.js homepage scene configuration
meta.retirementFlags: USE_SKY_DOME / ENABLE_GODRAYS / USE_MIST_FRONT in three-scene.js — atmosphere.js replaced dome (backdrop), god rays (light glow), and mist-front (haze)

depthOfField.note: REMOVED (cinematic overhaul 2026-07-02) — it gaussian-blurred the hero card; the reference keeps the card sharpest in frame.

godRays.note: DISABLED (ENABLE_GODRAYS=false) — the atmosphere's side glow replaced it. pmndrs GodRaysEffect; radiates from an emissive source sphere.

grade.note: final grade (grade-effect.js) in the last EffectPass (CA → grade → vignette → grain). Since the cinematic pass, HUE lives in the world (atmosphere temperature ramp) and the grade shapes VALUE only: neutral defaults (desat 0, grey shadow tint), shadow LIFT (uLift×shadowTint bed — blacks float, never crush) and highlight BEND (uHighBend — hot pixels converge on warm yellow-white, never pure white). Tints are static/GUI-owned; per-project transition() was removed 2026-07-03 (color arrives via medium.transition).
grade.shadowTint: #cecece (static — neutral lift; warm-dark like #8a6a55 would float blacks maroon instead)

afterimage.note: custom feedback Pass (afterimage-pass.js) between RenderPass and bloom — max(cur, prev×damp) ping-pong; trails glow. Disabled under reduced motion. GUI: trails enabled / trail length.

fluidDistortion.note: custom pmndrs Effect (fluid-distortion-effect.js); full-screen ripple from the fluid dye. GUI: enabled checkbox.

tiltShift.note: pmndrs TiltShiftEffect — ships DISABLED (blend SKIP; GUI toggle restores). Tuned 2026-07-03.

noise.note: Film grain — pmndrs NoiseEffect, ON since the cinematic pass (OVERLAY; GUI toggle round-trips via _originalBlend).

fluidInk.note: alien.js Fluid — cursor-splatted ink dye shared by the atmosphere fog, floor warp, and the screen distortion (dome consumers dormant while USE_SKY_DOME=false). Reduced-motion freezes it.

atmosphere.domeArchitecture: 2026-07-04: backdrop moved from a clip-space screen quad to a WORLD-SPACE sky dome matching the reference (brainstron/ref-skyDome.ms): IcosahedronGeometry r=300 detail=10, BackSide, center sunk y=-12.65 (horizon ring below eye level), rotated -72° about Y (UV seam behind the visible window). Fragment domain maps dome UV → the old p-units via uDomCenter/uDomScale (both scales NEGATIVE — three's polyhedron UV axes run opposite to screen), so all tuned kernel/cloud values carried over. Sky and floor now share one projection: camera motion moves them as one world; the Reflector mirrors the dome correctly. RETIRED: uFlipX mirror hack, uParallax/uAspect, skyFollowX/Y gains. Unlike the reference (lit MeshStandardMaterial + dome spin 5e-5), ours stays an UNLIT ShaderMaterial (light modeled via the shared kernel) and does NOT spin (geometry spin would drag the UV-anchored light kernel; wind supplies drift). Cursor-ink fog lookup is now gl_FragCoord/uResolution (screen effect).
atmosphere.note: Screen-space backdrop (atmosphere.js) — absorption/scattering cloudscape. Three wind-advected noise layers (depth parallax x1/x0.6/x1.6); transmittance = exp(-density*uAbsorb). Cinematic pass 2026-07-03: TWO-LOBE light kernel (broad skirt + tight hot core uCoreSize/uCoreBoost — sun-behind-fog column at the frame edge); temperature ramp along light intensity (uSmoke → uGlow → uHotColor, one hue axis) drives scatter/halo/core colors; CEILING LID (uLidDensity/uLidStart, screen-space, l1-modulated) — dark top band comes from smoke OCCLUDING the lit medium; lifted uBackdropFloor — 'dark' is dim rust, never black (the medium is the light fixture). Colors/kernel/wind/clocks adopted from atmosphereMedium by reference.
atmosphere.mobileDefine: MOBILE — fbm3 everywhere, layer 3 skipped (isMobile = width < 768)

cursorEnergy.note: Scalar integrated in _tick: energy += pointerSpeed * gain * dt, then *= exp(-dt/tau). Drives L3 detail, glow intensity, and the side light swell.

atmosphere.swirlNote: angular domain swirl (desktop only, skipped under MOBILE): sampling domain rotates by a breathing angle FIELD (fbm) → smoke curls/folds locally instead of panning in formation; plus evolution clock ev raised 0.006→0.025 and layer 2 counter-drifts against the wind (crossing layers kill the 'globe texture' read); the light kernel reads the unrotated domain
atmosphere.skyFollowNote: backdrop parallax rides the ACTUAL camera position (incl. breathing): skyFollowX 0.15, skyFollowY 0.3 with Y NEGATED (camera up → sky pans down with the floor → new sky reveals from the top, camera-pan feel instead of 'boat'); the ceiling lid y also rides the parallax so the smoke ceiling pans with the sky, not the frame
atmosphere.pocketNote: backlight pocket — stationary second kernel in p-space behind the card, tuned subtle (0.32) and biased to the card's dark left side, so the fringe silhouettes without flattening the projector story

ambientLight.note: AmbientLight kept in the scene at intensity 0 (tuned 2026-07-02: white fog + projector carry the look); re-enable via GUI.

sideLight.note: Real PointLight (side-light.js) matching the atmosphere's glow — rims the voxel card so it agrees with the bright right edge. Color gsap-tweens to each project's atmo.glow.

fog.note: Presets drive fog color/density only on project switch; fog colors match each project's atmo.base so scene fog never fights the backdrop. Lights: projector spotlight + side light.

voxel.geometry: RoundedBoxGeometry(cell, cell, cell, 1, cell * 0.04) — reference ratio 0.05/1.25; rounded edges catch the side/ambient light

material.note: Reference values: mid-gray so the projected image reads bright; depthTest off (paint order via renderOrder)

shaderUniforms.uFog: shares the medium's uBase color object by reference (was fixed #0a0e1a)

shaderConstants.cullField: _field = fbm(_cellUv * uCullScale + uTime * uCullDrift * (1,-0.65)) — ONE low-freq noise field over the face; holes cluster into organic bites, survivors form islands (ref). uCullDrift 0.036 = gentle migration (hand-tuned 2026-07-03; 0 freezes)
shaderConstants.erodeBand: _erode = smoothstep(uDenseRadius, uFadeRadius, _r) — NORMALIZED elliptical radius (uDenseRadius/uFadeRadius are 0-1 fractions of the half-extent, not cells); shared by cull threshold, opacity classes, and _move
shaderConstants.nearHoleGhosting: survivors with field within 0.16 below _th get alpha ×0.5 → soft translucent halos around bites (restored under cursor pool)
shaderConstants.scatterZMix: mix(_field-0.45, cubeRand-0.5, 0.25) — clusters recede together as blobs
shaderConstants.aRunRandStatus: attribute still uploaded but DORMANT since the noise-field cull replaced the run cull (2026-07-03)
shaderConstants.opacityClassEdgeGain: class fractions × mix(0.35, 3.2, smoothstep(uDenseRadius, uFadeRadius, distCells))

reflectiveFloor.note: Reference dark-mirror formula (brainstron/reference_vals.md): dark-gray base × reflection × mixStrength, ONE static soft normal map distorting the reflection (no time scroll). All floor motion comes from the reflected atmosphere. setColor() is a no-op — per-project hue arrives via the reflection. Moody pass: distance fog inside the shader converges the far ground to the medium's base color (horizon dissolves); fog density churns with a 1-octave field sample; ink lookup drifts with the shared wind. Cinematic pass 2026-07-03: GLOW WASH (uWashGain × medium glow color, smoothstep across world-x toward the light, noise-breathing) lights the dirt plane from the column side; CONTACT SHADOW (uContactDark, gaussian around the origin) seats the card on the ground.

uniforms.uFogCol: adopted from medium.u.uFog by reference (mist bank color)

reflectiveFloor.wavesNote: live micro-waves — slow two-axis noise scroll nudging the reflection lookup (uWaveAmp/Scale/Speed); the mirror breathes instead of reading as polished stone
reflectiveFloor.mistNote: ground mist banks flanking the card (|world x| uMistInner→uMistOuter, z-band near the card) — noise BOILS in place on its own clock (decoupled from wind advection) over a minimum-density floor (uMistFloor) so a bank thins but never vanishes; uMistLeftBoost equalizes the frame's dark side

projector.presenceNote: intensity = idle + (max-idle) * smoothed card proximity (cursor vs card rect, 1.5u margin, lerp 0.05)
projector.note: Light color tweens to lerp(white, atmo.glow, tint) on project switch (spot-projector transition()).

accentRetint.atmosphereMedium: ONE gsap 1.2s sine.inOut tween of the shared colors — backdrop, fog veil, floor fog, and card tint all follow by reference
accentRetint.reflectiveFloor: via medium (distance fog color) — no per-layer call

navigation.prefersReducedMotion: disables camera parallax, wobble, card tilt, shader uTime

perProject.title: Keploy
perProject.paletteSource: hand-tuned reference 2026-07-03 (derive-atmo.mjs reproduces it within a few degrees)

perProject.title: GEMx
perProject.paletteSource: derived from Gemx.png (dominant hue 157.7°) via scripts/derive-atmo.mjs

perProject.title: Demand Climate Justice
perProject.paletteSource: derived from DCJ.png (dominant hue 20.7°) via scripts/derive-atmo.mjs

paletteDerivation.note: Samples the cover image's dominant hue cluster (15° bins, chroma-weighted, greys/extremes excluded) and emits the four palette roles as literals: base fixed #111111; smoke = hsl(hue, .57, .42); glow = hue nudged ≤12° toward 45° warm anchor at hsl(·, .78, .58) — never white; fog = warm cream (35°) taking a 25% project tint at hsl(·, .55, .85). Calibrated so keploy.png reproduces the hand-tuned project-0 palette.

sceneGuiMapping.description: Maps lil-gui controls in scene-gui.js to JSON paths
sceneGuiMapping._pruned: big prune 2026-07-03 (hard to find sliders): folders REMOVED — Sky/environment (dome disabled), Ambient + Side light (off), Tilt-shift (disabled), Camera, Cursor energy, Fluid ink, Fluid distortion; rows REMOVED — floor height/offsets/tilt/reflectivity/fog near+far/fade radius, atmosphere L1-gates-L2 / energy detail gain / fog ink / light breathing / wind x+y / glow energy gain / glow mouse shift, projector cone/penumbra/distance/cursor travel. All still live via baked defaults; restore rows from git. Remaining folders: Reflective floor, Director, Atmosphere, Fog veil, Projector, Post, Cubes.

director.Density: scales uL1/2/3 alphas + inversely biases uAbsorb
director.Mood: uBackdropFloor down + vignette darkness up + grain opacity up

atmosphereMedium.note: Shared atmospheric medium (atmosphere-medium.js) — single source of truth. Backdrop, fog veil, floor fog, and the voxel card's uFog tint adopt its uniform OBJECTS by reference (setInk pattern); one medium.transition(palette) recolors the whole world. Owns the light kernel, wind, clocks, and the light-breathing life pack.
atmosphereMedium.palette: perProject[].atmo (project 0 regraded for the moody pass; 1-4 pending approval)

lifePack.lightBreathing: glowIntensity ±breatheAmt (0.135) on 7.3s + 11.7s sines, computed in medium.update()
lifePack.cameraBreathing: three-scene _tick: position ±0.02/±0.015 (9.2s/12.7s), fov ±0.15° (11s); skipped under reduced motion
lifePack.evolvingNoise: warp offsets drift on a 0.006 time scale so plumes change shape

fogVeil.note: Foreground haze (fog-veil.js) composited OVER card/floor/backdrop (renderOrder 20) — seats the card, fogs the ground junction. Consumes the medium by reference; nearest layer rides the wind fastest (x2.2) with its own domain offset. Also draws into the Reflector's mirror pass (desired).
